headline: 1 Plain-As-Day Dividend King to Buy on the Dip That Has Hiked Its Payout for 70 Consecutive Years
summary: Genuine Parts (NYSE:GPC) is a stock built to be owned for decades, because its 70 consecutive years of dividend increases were earned by a distribution business whose customers cannot choose to skip the purchase. That is the entire forever thesis in one sentence, and the rest of this piece simply unpacks why a retirement-focused investor ... 1 Plain-As-Day Dividend King to Buy on the Dip That Has Hiked Its Payout for 70 Consecutive Years
